message: Morning team! Feeling pumped for the big ?Hipster Haul? event this week?

Hey team, just dropping in to emphasise the urgency of resolving this issue swiftly. We've got a major event on the horizon - the launch of our exclusive "Hipster Haul Weekend" next week.
It's poised to be our biggest sale yet, and any delays caused by this payment glitch could seriously impact our preparations.

Let's prioritise frequent updates and keep the communication channels wide open.

What a ride! Massive thanks to each of you for your quick thinking and teamwork.
Absolutely, Shay! Getting more confident with any incidents that come our way. Good Job everyone!!
Phew, what a rollercoaster! Glad we managed to fix it before things got out of hand.
Good job everyone, but im confused how did those currencies fail recently if the change was made hours ago?
Good question @Tinus. The currency_service was using 'cache data' instead of getting the data from 3rd party service as i messed up the configuration of the APIs.
The cache data expires every 12 hours as well which must have been around the time Bob was getting the new reports.
Understood, thanks for clearing that up for me @Hamed.
Anyways with the fix in place, we've ensured that the system operates smoothly, and we're now ready once again for the big event next week.
Fantastic work, everyone! Your quick and effective response has saved the day. Now, let's channel this momentum into making our Hipster Haul Weekend a smashing success.
Thank you all for your dedication and hard work.
